summary: Partial order persists after item failure

summary: Required checkout fields are not validated
Cart is not refetched after successful login

summary: Expired authentication is displayed as an empty cart
root_cause: cart fetch does not check unauthorized response and Navbar trusts token presence

summary: Missing images render an empty src and trigger React warnings
root_cause: media resolver returns empty string and product image is rendered unconditionally
